name: pgweb
tagline: pgweb is a web-based database browser for PostgreSQL, written in Go.
description:
pgweb is a web-based database browser for PostgreSQL, written in Go.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  pgweb:
    image: sosedoff/pgweb:0.11.2
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42096:8081
